message:
fix(stream): add PolledAfterCompletion guards to Fold and TryFold futures

Fold:
- Add completed flag; assert on re-poll to catch misuse before the
  acc.take().expect() would panic with a less informative message
- New test fold_repoll_after_completion_fails_closed verifies the
  guard and confirms the upstream stream is not re-polled
- PollCountingEmptyStream test helper for verifying no upstream
  re-polling occurs

TryFold:
- Add completed flag set on all three terminal paths (Ok, inner Err,
  stream Err); assert on re-poll
- New test try_fold_repoll_after_completion_fails_closed
- PollCountingEmptyTryStream test helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
